body_txt: Inversion of the Robotic Reveal , where a machine that was assumed to be a robot turns out to hold a Man in the Machine or some other living creature powering or controlling it. They may also be an ostensibly Ridiculously Human Robot who turns out to be an actual human after all. A Mobile-Suit Human may allow this trope to be preceded by a Robotic Reveal as a Red Herring as there's a lot of machinery to expose before the actual pilot is revealed. For reveals involving a machine who used to be a living creature, see Was Once a Man .
